creator: mikkel@troest.dk
text:
Hi again,

Sorry for the loate follow up.

When ooo crashes, it does not actually produce a core dump! (?)
    - I've searched through all my drives - nothing...
I'm running a build with --enable-symbols=TRUE.

Are there any way to force the core dump when the crash occurs? - any 
envs that can be set or something?

:O) Mikkel
